query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.code, COUNT(l.id) as lesson_count FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE c.code LIKE 'GED%' OR c.code LIKE 'MATH%' OR c.code LIKE 'RLA%' OR c.code LIKE 'SCI%' OR c.code LIKE 'SS%' GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.code ORDER BY c.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.code, COUNT(l.id) as lesson_count FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lessons l ON c.id = l.courseId WHERE c.code LIKE 'GED%' OR c.code LIKE 'MATH%' OR c.code LIKE 'RLA%' OR c.code LIKE 'SCI%' OR c.code LIKE 'SS%' GROUP BY c.id, c.name, c.code ORDER BY c.name;
